top_signals.title: Netherlands seizes 800 servers of hosting firm enabling cyberattacks
top_signals.summary: Financial crime investigators in the Netherlands (FIOD) arrested two men and seized 800 servers linked to a web hosting company that enabled cyberattacks, interference operations, and disinformation campaigns. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
